rule: Not every decomposed capability becomes a product. First absorb knowledge, then classify equipment, then productize only what fits ZENTRA strategy.

general_ai.name: ZENTRA General AI
general_ai.role: General knowledge, programming, reasoning, system building and internal intelligence

academia_ai.name: ZENTRA Academia AI
academia_ai.role: Decomposition, competitor analysis, equipment extraction and arsenal building

intel_ai.name: ZENTRA Intel AI
intel_ai.role: Economic intelligence, decision systems and productizable modules

knowledgeAbsorption.reason: Used to improve reasoning, tool use, assistant logic and programming capability
knowledgeAbsorption.assignedLayer: ZENTRA General AI / ZENTRA Academia AI memory

knowledgeAbsorption.assignedLayer: ZENTRA General AI / ZENTRA Academia AI memory

equipmentOnly.reason: Used for alerting, distribution and founder reports; not necessarily sold as product

C: Strengthen Equipment → Product → Agent binding nervous system
